tagline: The managed Google Ads connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from Google Ads into Databricks.
what_it_does: The managed Google Ads connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from Google Ads into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta. Workspace admins can control access to this feature from the Previews page.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The managed Google Ads connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from Google Ads into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
key_takeaway: The managed Google Ads connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from Google Ads into Databricks.
